explanation: Insertion: Added base64 decoding via [System.Convert]::FromBase64String, which may bypass string-based detection by altering the command structure.
Recoding: Replaced base64 string with a UTF8 byte array, which may avoid direct string matching in the Sigma rule.
Substitution: Used the fully qualified type name [System.Reflection.Assembly] instead of the abbreviated form, which may avoid partial string matches.
